eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Arizona; at 6:35 PM on JUL 23, 2026 Effective until 2:35 AM JUL 24, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety.  A SAFE Alert has been issued for Yuma County. The Yuma County Sheriffs Office is looking for 90 year old Leland Persing.  Leland is a white male, 5 feet 11 inches tall, 210 pounds, has brown hair with brown eyes with an unknown clothing description.  He was last seen driving his 2004 Club golf cart bearing Arizona plate number DG4MA at 12:00 PM on July 22, 2026, near South Foothills Boulevard and East 43rd Drive in Yuma, Arizona.  Leland has a medical condition which may cause him to become lost or easily confused.  If you have seen Leland, please contact the Yuma County Sheriffs Office at 520-866-5111 or call 911. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
